form.label: SMARTnet Coverage
form.description: Version 1.2: Fixed using Sparing Policy Alignment coding techniques.

search.query: `cisco_oi_index(0)` sourcetype::cisco:bcs:contractserial | lookup `cisco_oi_asset_lookup(0)` serialNumber OUTPUT physicalAssetId, physicalAssetType, deviceId, deviceName, chassisName, productFamily | table deviceId, deviceName, chassisName, baseProductIdList{}.baseProductId, productFamily, contractSiteAddress, contractSiteCity, contractSiteCountry, contractSiteCustomerName, contractSiteStateProvince, coveredProductLineEndDate, index, isCovered, linecount, orderableProductIdList{}.itemDescription, orderableProductIdList{}.itemPosition, orderableProductIdList{}.itemType, orderableProductIdList{}.orderableProductId, orderableProductIdList{}.pillarCode, parentSerialNumber, serialNumber, serviceContractNumber, serviceLineDescription, splunk_server, timestamp, warrantyEndDate, warrantyType, warrantyTypeDescription | rename baseProductIdList{}.baseProductId as productId, orderableProductIdList{}.itemType as physicalAssetType | mvexpand deviceId | $singleLineGroupSelector$
`cisco_oi_index("$cpyKey$")` sourcetype::cisco:bcs:devicegroup | mvexpand groupName | dedup groupName | table groupName | sort groupName

condition.set: [| tstats values(deviceId) as deviceId WHERE ( `cisco_oi_index($cpyKey$)` sourcetype::cisco:bcs:devicegroupmember groupName="$groupIdSelected$")]
search [| tstats values(deviceId) as deviceId WHERE ( `cisco_oi_index($cpyKey$)` sourcetype::cisco:bcs:devicegroupmember groupName="$groupIdSelected$")]

search.query: | stats count as Initialize | eval Heading="No Current SMARTnet Coverage" | table Heading
| loadjob $base_smartnet_coverage_sid$ | search isCovered="false" | $singleLineGroupSelector$ | stats count as Chassis by productFamily | sort -Chassis
| loadjob $base_smartnet_coverage_sid$ | search isCovered="false" AND physicalAssetType=Chassis | $singleLineGroupSelector$ | stats count as Chassis by productId | sort -Chassis | head 10
| stats count as Initialize | eval Heading="SMARTnet Coverage Ends in 1-90 Days" | table Heading

panel.title: Coverage Ends in 90 Days by Product Family

search.query: | loadjob $base_smartnet_coverage_sid$ | search isCovered!=false | $singleLineGroupSelector$ | eval EndDate = strptime(coveredProductLineEndDate, "%Y-%m-%d") | eval dateToday = now() | where (dateToday < EndDate) AND (EndDate < relative_time(now(),"+90d@d")) | stats count by productFamily

panel.title: Chassis Coverage Ends in 90 Days by PID

search.query: | loadjob $base_smartnet_coverage_sid$ | search isCovered!=false AND physicalAssetType=Chassis | $singleLineGroupSelector$ | eval EndDate = strptime(coveredProductLineEndDate, "%Y-%m-%d") | eval dateToday = now() | where (dateToday < EndDate) AND (EndDate < relative_time(now(),"+90d@d")) | stats count as Chassis by productId | sort -Chassis
| stats count as Initialize | eval Heading="SMARTnet Coverage Ends in 91-180 Days" | table Heading

panel.title: Coverage Ends in 91-180 Days by Product Family

search.query: | loadjob $base_smartnet_coverage_sid$ | search isCovered!=false | $singleLineGroupSelector$ | eval EndDate = strptime(coveredProductLineEndDate, "%Y-%m-%d") | eval dateToday = now() | where (EndDate > relative_time(now(),"+90d@d")) AND (EndDate < relative_time(now(),"+180d@d")) | stats count by productFamily

panel.title: Chassis Coverage Ends in 91-180 Days by PID

search.query: | loadjob $base_smartnet_coverage_sid$ | search isCovered!=false AND physicalAssetType=Chassis | $singleLineGroupSelector$ | eval EndDate = strptime(coveredProductLineEndDate, "%Y-%m-%d") | eval dateToday = now() | where (EndDate > relative_time(now(),"+90d@d")) AND (EndDate < relative_time(now(),"+180d@d")) | stats count as Chassis by productId | sort -Chassis
| stats count as Initialize | eval Heading="SMARTnet Coverage Ends in 181-365 Days" | table Heading

panel.title: Coverage Ends in 181-365 Days by Product Family

search.query: | loadjob $base_smartnet_coverage_sid$ | search isCovered!=false | $singleLineGroupSelector$ | eval EndDate = strptime(coveredProductLineEndDate, "%Y-%m-%d") | eval dateToday = now() | where (EndDate > relative_time(now(),"+181d@d")) AND (EndDate < relative_time(now(),"+365d@d")) | stats count by productFamily

panel.title: Chassis Coverage Ends in 181-365 Days by PID

search.query: | loadjob $base_smartnet_coverage_sid$ | search isCovered!=false AND physicalAssetType=Chassis | $singleLineGroupSelector$ | eval EndDate = strptime(coveredProductLineEndDate, "%Y-%m-%d") | eval dateToday = now() | where (EndDate > relative_time(now(),"+181d@d")) AND (EndDate < relative_time(now(),"+365d@d")) | stats count as Chassis by productId | sort -Chassis | head 10
